title: Electrical Engineer
description:
Job Responsibilities

i. Design and Development

  • Design and develop electrical systems and components used in wafer probers, including sensors, actuators, control systems, and power distribution.
  • Create detailed electrical schematics, wiring diagrams, and layout drawings using CAD software.
  • Conduct feasibility studies, simulations, and analyses to validate design concepts and performance.

ii. Prototyping and Testing

  • Build and test prototypes to evaluate the performance and reliability of electrical systems.
  • Conduct experiments and tests to ensure that designs meet performance criteria and industry standards.
  • Analyze test results and make necessary design adjustments to improve functionality and efficiency.

iii. Collaboration and Communication

  • Work closely with cross-functional teams, including mechanical, software, and systems engineers, to ensure seamless integration of electrical systems with material handlers and wafer probers.
  • Communicate design concepts, progress, and issues to stakeholders and team members.
  • Collaborate with customers to understand their requirements and provide technical support and solutions.

iv. Innovation and Improvement

  • Stay updated with the latest advancements in electrical engineering and semiconductor industry trends.
  • Identify opportunities for innovation and continuous improvement in electrical solutions for material handlers.
  • Implement feedback from field tests and customer use to refine and enhance designs.

v. Project Management

  • Manage electrical design projects from concept to completion, ensuring timelines and quality standards are met.
  • Prepare and maintain project documentation, including design reports, test plans, and technical manuals.
  • Coordinate with project managers and other engineers to align with project goals and deadlines.

vi. Quality Assurance and Compliance

  • Ensure all electrical designs comply with industry standards, safety regulations, and company policies.
  • Conduct risk assessments and implement safety measures in design and testing processes.
  • Document and address any potential hazards associated with electrical systems.

Required Skills and Qualifications

1. Technical Skills

  • Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., AutoCAD Electrical, EPLAN) for designing electrical systems.
  • Strong understanding of electrical principles, control systems, and power distribution.
  • Knowledge of sensors, actuators, and other electrical components used in material handling systems.
  • Familiarity with PLC programming and automation technologies.

2. Analytical and Problem-Solving Skills

  • Strong analytical skills to assess system performance and identify areas for improvement.
  • Ability to troubleshoot and resolve complex electrical design issues.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

3. Education and Experience

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in electrical engineering, mechatronics, or a related field.
  • Relevant experience in designing electrical systems for material handling or semiconductor equipment.
  • Experience with wafer probers or semiconductor testing equipment is advantageous.

4. Soft Skills

  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
  • Strong organizational skills and a commitment to producing high-quality work.

Additional Responsibilities

· Supplier and Vendor Management

  • Work with suppliers and vendors to source high-quality electrical components for material handling systems.
  • Evaluate and select suppliers based on quality, cost, and reliability.
  • Manage relationships with suppliers to ensure timely delivery of components and materials.

· Training and Support

  • Provide technical support and training to manufacturing and maintenance teams on electrical systems.
  • Develop and maintain training materials and technical documentation for end-users.
  • Assist in the resolution of customer issues related to electrical systems.

· Sustainability and Efficiency

  • Promote sustainable practices and environmental responsibility in electrical design activities.
  • Identify and implement measures to improve efficiency and reduce waste in electrical processes.
  • Conduct regular reviews and audits to ensure compliance with sustainability goals.

· Customer Focus

  • Develop and maintain strong relationships with key customers.
  • Ensure that electrical solutions meet or exceed customer expectations.
  • Act as a primary point of contact for customer inquiries and issues related to electrical systems.

postedCompany.description:
TQC Precision Engineering was established in 2005 with the core business activity in Strategic Commodity & Supply Chain Management for the engineering and technology industries.

But over the years, the company has evolved and specialized into the precision machining of metallic parts, high performance engineering plastic and ceramic materials used in the semiconductor, medical component and devices, sensors and optical industries.
postedCompany.name: TQC PRECISION ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
